targets.expr: sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{cluster=~"$cluster",pod=~"$pod",container =~"$container",container !="",container!="POD",namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (container,pod,node,namespace)
sum(container_memory_working_set_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster",namespace=~"$namespace", pod=~"$pod", container=~"$container", container !="",container!="POD"}) by (container,pod,node,namespace)

sum(sum(rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster",pod=~"$pod",namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (pod)* on(pod) group_right kube_pod_container_info{cluster=~"$cluster",pod=~"$pod",namespace=~"$namespace",container =~"$container"}) by(pod) *8

sum(sum(rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster",pod=~"$pod",namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (pod)* on(pod) group_right kube_pod_container_info{cluster=~"$cluster",pod=~"$pod",namespace=~"$namespace",container =~"$container"}) by(pod) *8
sum(rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster",pod=~"$pod",container =~"$container",container !="",container!="POD",namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (container,pod,node,namespace)
sum(rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{cluster=~"$cluster",pod=~"$pod",container =~"$container",container !="",container!="POD",namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) by (container,pod,node,namespace)

kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{cluster=~"$cluster",
  pod=~"$pod", 
  container=~"$container", 
  container!="", 
  container!="POD", 
  namespace=~"$namespace"
} 
* on (pod, namespace) group_left(node) 
kube_pod_info{cluster=~"$cluster",
  pod=~"$pod", 
  namespace=~"$namespace"
}

sum by(source) (count_over_time({source="fluent_bit", job="kube_events", cluster=~"$cluster"}
 | json
 | metadata_namespace=~"$namespace"
 | type = `Warning`
  [$__range])>0)

{source="fluent_bit", job="kube_logs", cluster=~"$cluster", kubernetes_namespace_name=~"$namespace", kubernetes_container_name=~"$container", kubernetes_pod_name=~"$pod" }
  | json
  | regexp `\[(?P<level>[A-Z]+)\]`
  | line_format "{{.kubernetes_pod_name}} ➡️ {{.log}}"
